message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam packageStyle rectangle

actor "Main" as Main

rectangle "YAMLConfiguration" as YAMLConfig {
}

rectangle "BufrParser" as BufrParser {
}

rectangle "DataContainer" as DataContainer {
}

rectangle "IodaEncoder" as IodaEncoder {
}

Main -> YAMLConfig : YAMLConfiguration(confPath)
activate Main
activate YAMLConfig
deactivate YAMLConfig

Main -> BufrParser : BufrParser(conf)
activate BufrParser

Main -> BufrParser : parse
note right of BufrParser: See Query Collecting Data sequence.
activate BufrParser

BufrParser -> DataContainer : DataContainer()
activate DataContainer
deactivate DataContainer

BufrParser --> Main : dataContainer
deactivate BufrParser

Main -> IodaEncoder : IodaEncoder(conf)
activate IodaEncoder

Main -> IodaEncoder : encode(dataContainer)
note right of IodaEncoder: See Query Getting Data sequence.
activate IodaEncoder
deactivate IodaEncoder
deactivate IodaEncoder
deactivate Main

@enduml
```
